prompt: A die-cut vinyl sticker on a plain neutral background, isolated with clean white die-cut border and soft drop shadow, studio product shot. Design is a rounded badge in AITX orange #ff4201 shaped like a Texas-friendly seal. Inside, bold black stacked text reads exactly: 'BUILT THE SLOW WAY' on top and 'Y'ALL' large below it, with a small line under it reading 'loyalty. reputation. good vibes.' A thin ring border in NVIDIA green #76b900 circles the badge, with a tiny 'AITX x NVIDIA' at the bottom of the ring, NVIDIA wordmark in green #76b900. The small orange AITX open-arms mark sits at the top center of the badge. Flat vector, glossy vinyl finish, warm paper white background inside the badge, clean and premium.
